title: sql.translate

fetch_size.description: The maximum number of rows (or entries) to return in one response.

filter.description: The Elasticsearch query DSL for additional filtering.

time_zone.description: The ISO-8601 time zone ID for the search.

description:
Translate SQL into Elasticsearch queries.

Translate an SQL search into a search API request containing Query DSL.
It accepts the same request body parameters as the SQL search API, excluding `cursor`.
